claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A modal destructive confirmation with a named consequence, explicit-only dismissal, and least-destructive initial focus.
semantics: Content uses role=alertdialog with a Title and associated consequence Description.
leastDestructiveRef must identify the contained Cancel/return action and receives initial focus.
Outside interaction and Escape do not dismiss; Action or Cancel is explicit.
The destructive Action is visually and textually distinct and activates only through normal button completion.

messageKeys.context: Visible default AlertDialog.Cancel text when children are omitted.

preferences.forcedColors: A text exclamation marker supplements destructive color and system boundaries remain visible.
preferences.rtl: Action layout uses logical order and portal direction.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Consequence and both decisions remain readable and reachable.
